messages.content: What phrase describes businesses who develop a positive relationship to society? A: Greening the office; B: Social responsibility; C: Eco-corporations; or =D: Social behavior?
When businesses raise the price of a needed product or service after a natural disaster, this is known as... A: plagiarism; B: price gouging; C: confidentiality; D: social responsibility

If you find yourself part of a team at work, what is the best way to behave during a team meeting? A: Be silent and polite, and write everything down; B: Refrain from asking questions, so as to not interrupt anyone; C: Stay focused on the topic and make sure your contributions are relevant; or---D: Take a video of the meeting so you don't miss anything.
C: Stay focused on the topic and make sure your contributions are relevant

What are work content skills? A: Skills that require one to work with their hands and perform technical operations; B: Skills that are needed in all jobs; C: Skills needed to perform a certain kind of job; or---D: Skills that are designed to fill out your content resume?
C: Skills needed to perform a certain kind of job
You will want to list your work content skills, functional skills, educational history, and work experience in your... A: portfolio; B: status report; C: resume; d: assessment

Cassandra noticed a few files were improperly named on her company's database. While not typically a problem, she knew that in this instance it would cause problems when those files were transferred to another system. Rather than keep working, she stopped what she was doing for 20 minutes and wrote an email to her boss detailing what she found. What quality has Cassandra demonstrated? A: Enthusiasm; B: Initiative; C: Social responsibility; or---D: Appropriate Attire?

Your co-worker spends most of her day figuring out the best way to promote the products your company produces. Your co-worker works in what department? A: accounting; B: entrepreneurship; C: finance; or---D: marketing?

Ken works for a company that has many different departments, and there are vice presidents who oversee each department. What type of organization is Ken's company? A: Centralized; B: Right-leaning; C: Decentralized; or---D: Left-leaning?

Mike has never used slide presentation software before, but he needs to create a presentation by the end of the week. What resource would be most helpful to Mike? A: The 350-page printed manual from the slide presentation software publisher; B: A trouble-shooting website created by a third party; C: The 350-page online manual from the slide presentation software publisher; or---D: A free tutorial the slide presentation software publisher has posted on the company website?
D: A free tutorial the slide presentation software publisher has posted on the company website
